title: Element card in shared calendar view
excerpt:
Hi, 
i made a calendar view to share with other people not in my account. 
Why they cannot click on the elements to see the element card with the details? 
This would be very useful 
Thanks

posts.author: monicap90 (Monica Panozzo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
i made a calendar view to share with other people not in my account.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re open to using marketplace apps, you can try Calendar Plus. It allows you select extra information to show in the calendar, and all the details you opt to make available are available on hover:

image823×585 80.3 KB

–
